name: scope-creep-detector
tagline: Compares a git diff against a stated intent to flag scope creep and recommend keep/split/justify per file, fully local and read-only.
verdict: Clean, safe skill: explicitly offline, read-only, asks before any mutating action, with clear negative triggers and decision criteria. Minor gaps: the JSON output schema has no worked example, and the python3 dependency is used without an explicit requirement/availability check.

highlights.summary: The JSON output schema (in_scope, likely_creep, new_deps, etc.) is described field-by-field but never shown as a worked example.
python3 is invoked repeatedly (`python3 scripts/scope_creep.py ...`) with no upfront requirements note or availability check.
